label: onchain-reconcile-subagent
notes: All entries in trading-bot/state/trades.jsonl are BLOCKED or have no output; no on-chain TXs to reconcile.
No network lookups performed because SOLANA_RPC_URL and Helius/BirdEye keys are required and not provided to this subagent.

If you want full authoritative reconciliation, run this subagent on a host with SOLANA_RPC_URL and Helius API key env vars available; it will fetch txs, compute flows, convert to USD, and update state/trades.jsonl with reconciled fields.
